business_ideas.idea: Unscheduled life philosophy: making calendar open for most valuable work daily
Maker vs manager schedule: block time into 90-minute creative sprints with flexibility
Barbell strategy for relationships: many quick texts plus deep full-day hangouts
Morning workout before podcast: early exercise to maximize daily energy and presence

predictions.text: Unscheduled life requires specific life circumstances but is worth planning career toward
Most people will default to autopilot without quarterly priority reflection
